evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 40 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Participant (male or female) must be aged 40 years and older.~* Diagnosis of heart failure with New York Heart Association(NYHA) class II-IV, ambulatory or hospitalized primarily for heart failure.~* On diuretic treatment for at least 30 days prior to randomization.~* Documented left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) of ≥40% measured by any modality within the last 12 months.~* Structural heart abnormalities based on any local imaging measurement within the last 12 mont...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Cardiovascular death or hospitalisation for heart failure (primary composite, trial-specific primary endpoint)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=6 Pbo-controlled Phase 3 trials; each SGLT2i has 2 direct Pbo-anchored trials (precision-adequate). Network is a Pbo-star (no closed loops). Indirect Dapa-vs-Empa, Dapa-vs-Sota, Empa-vs-Sota contrasts computed through the Pbo anchor. Consistency test not defined in star-only networks; report pairwise direct estimates + indirect contrasts with explicit declaration.

title: RapidMeta Cardiology | HF Quadruple Therapy NMA (SGLT2i / ARNI / MRA / β-blocker) v1.0
